data.title: SEC and CFTC Signal End to Crypto Turf Wars in Joint Harmonization Push
data.description:
The U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission and the Commodity Futures Trading Commission held a historic joint “harmonization” event, marking a coordinated shift in how the United States regulates digital assets. SEC Chairman Paul Atkins and CFTC Chairman Michael Selig jointly signaled an end to the long-standing jurisdictional disputes that have fragmented crypto oversight
source: https://www.ethnews.com/sec-and-cftc-signal-end-to-crypto-turf-wars-in-joint-harmonization-push/

data.title: Trump threatens to impose a 50% tariff on Canadian aircraft.
data.description: Trump stated on social media that, given Canada's erroneous, illegal, and persistent refusal to certify Gulfstream jets, he is revoking the certification of the Bombardier Global Express aircraft and all other Canadian-made aircraft until Gulfstream receives full certification, which should have been completed years ago. Furthermore, Canada has effectively banned the sale of Gulfstream products in Canada through the same certification process. If these issues are not rectified immediately, he will impose a 50% tariff on all Canadian aircraft imported into the US. (Jinshi)

data.title: Sources: Trump and Democrats reach agreement on funding to avoid government shutdown.
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump and Senate Democrats reached an agreement on Thursday to avoid a prolonged shutdown of most of the federal government, according to five sources familiar with the matter. This move aims to ease the intense battle over funding for the Department of Homeland Security and Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE), which reached a fever pitch after two U.S. citizens were shot and killed by law enforcement in Minneapolis. While funding for several agencies will be temporarily suspended starting at 00:01 local time on Saturday, the impact is expected to be minimal, as most federal employees do not work over the weekend. The Senate could vote on the appropriations agreement as early as Thursday evening. The House of Representatives will return to Washington on Monday to pass the bill and send it to President Trump for his signature. (NBC News)

data.title: Senate Committee Passes CLARITY Act Amidst Partisan Division
data.description:
CLARITY Act progresses with a narrow Senate vote, revealing deep partisan divides over cryptocurrency regulation.
source: https://coincu.com/news/senate-clarity-act-vote-crypto/

data.title: Trump Threatens Tariffs on Canadian Aircraft Over Certification Dispute
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced on social media that he is revoking the certification of Bombardier Global Express and all Canadian-manufactured aircraft. According to Jin10, this decision comes in response to Canada's alleged wrongful and illegal refusal to certify Gulfstream jets. Trump stated that the certification for Gulfstream should have been completed years ago. He also claimed that Canada has effectively banned Gulfstream products from being sold in the country through the same certification process. Trump warned that if the issue is not resolved immediately, he will impose a 50% tariff on all Canadian aircraft imported into the United States.

data.title: SWIFT to Introduce Global Payments Scheme by 2026
data.description:
SWIFT has announced plans to implement a new global payments scheme by 2026, designed to enhance the speed and predictability of cross-border transactions for consumers and small to medium-sized enterprises (SMEs). According to NS3.AI, the initiative will focus on improving transparency and fee disclosure, aiming to make international payments as seamless as domestic transfers.

The organization is integrating a blockchain-based ledger to enhance payment tracking capabilities. However, SWIFT will maintain its existing correspondent banking settlement system and will not be adopting cryptocurrencies such as XRP. Ripple's blockchain-powered liquidity-saving solutions continue to be relevant in certain areas where SWIFT's model does not address pre-funding capital inefficiencies.

data.title: UBS Raises Gold Price Forecast for 2026
data.description: UBS has maintained its bullish stance on gold, adjusting its price targets for March, June, and September 2026 to $6,200 per ounce, up from the previous $5,000 per ounce. According to BlockBeats, the financial institution anticipates a moderate decline to $5,900 per ounce by the end of 2026. UBS currently projects an upside scenario target of $7,200 per ounce and a downside scenario target of $4,600 per ounce, reflecting a fluctuation close to one standard deviation.

data.title: Senator Klobuchar Warns Against Expanding CFTC Powers Without Full Committee
data.description: On January 30, during a meeting between the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) to discuss regulatory coordination in the crypto sector, Senator Amy Klobuchar issued a warning. According to BlockBeats, she cautioned against expanding the CFTC's powers without a fully constituted committee. Klobuchar emphasized, "We cannot grant such extensive new powers to the Commodity Futures Trading Commission when it has only one member."

data.title: U.S. Senate Advances Crypto Market Structure Bill – What’s Next CLARITY Act?
data.description:
The US Senate Agriculture Committee voted 12-11 to advance the crypto market structure bill, moving closer to the CLARITY Act that aims to clarify digital asset regulation and consumer protections.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/us-senate-advances-crypto-market-bill-whats-next/

data.title: Trump Signs Executive Order Declaring National Emergency Over Cuba Oil Trade
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has signed an executive order declaring a national emergency, according to Jin10. The order establishes a procedure to impose tariffs on goods from countries that sell or otherwise provide oil to Cuba. This move is part of a broader strategy to exert economic pressure on Cuba by targeting its oil supply chain. The White House aims to discourage international trade with Cuba, particularly in the energy sector, as part of its foreign policy objectives. The executive order reflects ongoing tensions between the United States and Cuba, with the U.S. government seeking to limit Cuba's access to resources and influence its economic activities.

data.title: Optimism Governance Approves OP Buybacks Using Protocol Revenue
data.description:
The Optimism governance community has approved a major change to the OP token’s economic model, voting to allocate 50% of net protocol revenue toward recurring OP token buybacks. The proposal was finalized on January 29, 2026, passing with 84. 4% support
source: https://www.ethnews.com/optimism-governance-approves-op-buybacks-using-protocol-revenue/

data.title: Ethereum's Oldest Crisis Reborn as a $220 Million Security Fund
data.description:
Unclaimed Ethereum from a decade-long hack will be staked and distributed to fund audits, tooling, and incident responses.
source: https://decrypt.co/356404/ethereum-crisis-reborn-220-million-security-fund

data.title: Circle's Outlook Improves Amid Ethereum and DeFi Correlation
data.description: Circle's outlook has shifted positively as its correlation with Ethereum and decentralized finance (DeFi) strengthens. According to NS3.AI, this change has led to a re-rating of Circle, although concerns about its valuation and competitive pressures continue to linger. The stock remains volatile, highlighting ongoing uncertainties within the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: El Salvador Expands Gold and Bitcoin Reserves
data.description: El Salvador's central bank has increased its gold holdings by purchasing an additional $50 million, bringing the total to over $360 million. According to NS3.AI, the government is also continuing its accumulation of Bitcoin, which now totals $635 million in value. This strategy underscores El Salvador's approach to diversifying its reserves by incorporating both traditional and digital assets.

data.title: Significant Transfer of TON Tokens to Kiln Identified
data.description: A substantial transfer of TON tokens has been detected. According to ChainCatcher, Arkham data reveals that at 06:14, a total of 13,755,700 TON tokens were moved from an anonymous address, beginning with UQBYXa, to Kiln.
